support.summary: No CEO-irreplaceable lever; RSD owns pricing and champion access
support.detail: Domino's Pizza Enterprises ($450k, Formal Evaluation) is sole-sourced (competitor is Do Nothing) with strong champion Jai Rastogi (Group CPO) coaching Zycus ahead of any RFP. Jai asked Luke to 'be aggressive to help' on pricing (10 Jun), but that is a standard CRO/RVP discount decision, not a CEO veto. No roadmap commitment, presales guarantee, or CEO-to-buyer peer relationship is required at this POC-scoping stage; CFO Lynn Carruthers is unengaged but the gate is POC ROI, not a CEO peer connect.

buyer_target.name: Jai Rastogi
buyer_target.title: Group Chief Procurement and Supply Chain Officer

support.why_not_vp: Any commercial flexibility Jai requested can be approved by the CRO/RVP; nothing here is CEO-irreplaceable.

monitor.reason: Deal is actively engaged with fresh two-way email through 2 Jul, a call on 3 Jul, stable close date, and no competitor threat.
